title: FormulaConditionResult
description: FormulaConditionResult: Object representing result of FormulaCondition.

Passed.description: Information whether the object passed or failed the condition. Null means inconclusive result.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

Components.description: Values of components (variables) calculated in the process of obtaining the final result.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
